::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="has-math"}

::: {.hidden}

<!-- Groundwork -->
$$
\gdef\sub#1{_{\mathrm{#1}}}
\gdef\unit#1{\mathrm{#1}}
$$
<!-- Physical units -->
$$
\gdef\celsius{\unit{°C}}
\gdef\gram{\unit{g}}
\gdef\joule{\unit{J}}
\gdef\kelvin{\unit{K}}
\gdef\kilogram{\unit{kg}}
\gdef\liter{\unit{L}}
\gdef\milliliter{\unit{mL}}
\gdef\meter{\unit{m}}
\gdef\mole{\unit{mol}}
\gdef\newton{\unit{N}}
\gdef\pascal{\unit{Pa}}
$$
<!-- Prefixed units -->
$$
\gdef\kilojoule{\unit{k}\joule}
$$
<!-- Exponentiated units -->
$$
\gdef\squaremeter{\meter^2}
\gdef\cubicmeter{\meter^3}
$$
<!-- Combined physical units -->
$$
\gdef\cubicmeter_per_mole{\frac{\cubicmeter}{\mole}}
\gdef\newton_per_kilogram{\frac{\newton}{\kilogram}}
\gdef\joule_per_mole{\frac{\joule}{\mole}}
\gdef\joule_per_kilogram{\frac{\joule}{\kilogram}}
\gdef\joule_per_kelvin{\frac{\joule}{\kelvin}}
\gdef\joule_per_kilogram_per_kelvin{\frac{\joule}{\kilogram\,\kelvin}}
\gdef\joule_per_mole_per_kelvin{\frac{\joule}{\mole\,\kelvin}}
\gdef\kilojoule_per_kilogram{\frac{\kilojoule}{\kilogram}}
\gdef\kilojoule_per_mole{\frac{\kilojoule}{\mole}}
\gdef\kilojoule_per_gram{\frac{\kilojoule}{\gram}}
\gdef\kilojoule_per_kelvin{\frac{\kilojoule}{\kelvin}}
\gdef\kilojoule_per_kilogram_per_kelvin{\frac{\kilojoule}{\kilogram\,\kelvin}}
\gdef\kilojoule_per_mole_per_kelvin{\frac{\kilojoule}{\mole\,\kelvin}}
$$

:::

:::
